criteria.text: Given the docs, When a dev reads them, Then the command and the reflect-back/agree step are described, and the feedback record schema is documented (records queryable by version/user/type, joinable via sessionId).

Given the docs, When a dev reads the telemetry section, Then the metadata-only privacy guarantee for all other telemetry is explicitly stated as unchanged, and the current no-server-dedup gap is noted.
